name: ListenLoop
desc: A real-time mobile-first social listening platform. Join rooms, listen to synced YouTube music, chat, react with floating emojis, and vote on the queue together.

name: Time Tracker
desc: A distraction-free tool designed to help you manage your office hours effortlessly. It tracks work sessions, manages breaks, and calculates when you can head home.

name: This Portfolio
desc: My latest portfolio, which you are currently viewing, is built using Nuxt.js and Tailwind CSS.
